parts.text: I’m calling because my statement shows a device balance I don’t understand.
Please tell me when my next device balance payment is due.
I’m checking to see if my device is fully paid off or still under financing.
Can you send me the details of my phone financing balance by email or text?
I’d like to review how much I’ve already paid and what’s left on my device.
What’s the difference between my billing balance and my device balance?
I’m trying to verify my payoff amount for the phone I’m currently using.
I just upgraded, but I’d like to check if I still have an outstanding device balance.
Can I pay off the remaining device balance early without penalties?
I want to confirm the balance due before upgrading my phone.
Please tell me if my last payment cleared and what’s still pending on my device.
I’d like to know if my device balance will be charged on my final bill.
How do I find out how many months are left on my phone payment plan?
I’d like to double-check if my device has any remaining payments.
Can you break down my current phone balance including taxes or fees?
I want to pay off the remaining balance on my device
today
How can I view my device balance through self-serve or online?
I need to know the exact amount left to fully pay off my phone.
Could you tell me what my current device balance shows on my account?
I’m calling to find out the remaining balance on my mobile device.
Please provide the total amount I still owe for my phone installment plan.
I just want to confirm my outstanding balance for my financed phone.
Can you tell me how much is left to pay off my current device?
I’d like to check the remaining balance I owe on my phone.
